mapper.select: SELECT cg.id, cg.name, cg.avatar, cgm.remark as userRemark, count(cm.id) AS unreadCount FROM chat_group cg INNER JOIN chat_group_member cgm ON cg.id = cgm.group_id and cgm.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN chat_message cm ON cm.chat_id = concat('group-', cg.id) AND cm.send_id != #{userId} AND cm.is_read = 0 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cgm.user_id = #{userId} AND cg.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY cg.id, cgm.remark
